visual_description: Two silhouetted figures are visible on a snow-covered slope at night, illuminated by distant artificial lights. One figure is mid-motion, appearing to fall or slide down the slope, while the other stands near the bottom, facing away from the camera. The scene is framed by dark, snow-dusted buildings on either side, with the snow-covered ground stretching upward into a hazy, dimly lit environment.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone with a moderate pace and pitch, accompanied by a noticeable gasp at the beginning.
